title: Thought on using Reis Poem
wikitext:
[]: Thought on using "Rei's Poem" Post by V » Sun Apr 29, 2007 7:48 am re: Rei's poem from Episode 14; I got this funny idea that they should actually work that into either Rebuild or Live Action, but as a joke; i.e. in school they have "write your own poem" assignment and Rei stands in front of class and recites the poem. This, of course, falls into the same category as "wouldn't it be cool if Asuka hums Rammestein to herself absentmindedly at some point"

[]: Post by The Goose » Sun Apr 29, 2007 8:15 am Like a funny homage? That would be great. Then, Shinji can have a headache like when he was in Unit-01.

[]: Post by V » Sun Apr 29, 2007 8:19 am yeah I mean like as an in-joke maybe not even the entire poem; i.e. Asuka and Shinji have a conversation in class and Rei is heard reciting it in the backround

[]: Post by Kaysow » Sun Apr 29, 2007 8:27 am This thread tickles my fancy! MOAR!!

[]: Post by fadingreminder » Sun Apr 29, 2007 9:16 am That's really funny, imagining it. Kensuke goes up, reads a war styled poem. Touji goes up, reads a poorly written, but hard-worked poem about his sister. Shinji goes up, a lot of "blue, shoe, clue" kiddie rhyming about nothing in particular. Rei goes up, recites poem, looks up to a sea of disturbed/confused faces.

[]: Post by Zkh » Sun Apr 29, 2007 11:07 am And then you all wake up.

[]: Post by V » Sun Apr 29, 2007 12:44 pm Well yeah seriously, I mean just "in the backround" as Asuka, Shinji, Toji and Hikari talk about something else. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5AYjW7IUWOw

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 29, 2007 3:38 pm Whoa. O_O Though it's the dub and an "AMV" somebody did, it works really well with EoE footage. Though because Rei was in Unit01 when saying the part about "sensing someone else", I believe it implied Yui as opposed to having Lilith's soul?? Anyway, having various nods to the original even in the background WOULD be pretty sweet. ^__^

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 29, 2007 4:07 pm It's a "monologue", not a "poem".

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Apr 29, 2007 4:17 pm Reichu wrote: It's a "monologue", not a "poem".

[]: Post by slothen » Sun Apr 29, 2007 6:16 pm i like this.

[]: Post by Zkh » Sun Apr 29, 2007 6:40 pm If someone read that in my class I'd laugh at them and throw stuff at them, then make fun of Toji's sister, hit on Asuka, take Kensuke's glasses, make out with Shinji, and spread rumors that Hikari is Pregnant, and you would too. The whole class is bully material.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Sun Apr 29, 2007 7:14 pm Zkh wrote: make out with Shinji

[]: Post by Zkh » Sun Apr 29, 2007 7:29 pm BrikHaus wrote: Who do you think you are? Kaworu?

[]: Post by V » Sun Apr 29, 2007 8:41 pm dude...spread rumors that Hikari is pregnant.....mean....

[]: Post by slothen » Sun Apr 29, 2007 11:14 pm i like this idea.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Apr 30, 2007 10:14 pm Hikari pregnant- I'm sure you can find fan fiction of that. As for the poem. Nah. It just sounds like one of those lame "nudge, nudge, wink, wink" moments to please only the fans....who then go around and complain because well...their fans. They always find a way. I don't even thik too much timeis gonna be spent at the school despite all the hoopla about it. 15-20 minutes tops. Probably have the teacher upgraded to a hottie to sell some kind of bikini based figurine at some point. Though "Rei's Poem" was a good moment in the TV series. It was the quintessential moment when you could tell..."Wait, I thought this was an action series....why's she floating naked across the sky? Why doesn't she have nipples (if I based my knowledge of women on anime nipples seem to come and go depending on the situation)?" Now whenever I see that scene I just go- "Oh Anno!"

[]: Post by Szmitten » Tue May 01, 2007 5:22 am Am I the only person who hates the "poem"? And am I the only Evangelion enthusiast who hasn't memorised the bloody thing?

[]: Post by Reichu » Tue May 01, 2007 7:35 am IT'S OFFICIALLY CALLED "Rei'S MONOLOGUE", PEOPLE. IF I HAVE TO HEAR ONE MORE THING ABOUT A "POEM", I'M GOING TO KILL SOMEBODY.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue May 01, 2007 7:42 am Reichu wrote: ... I'M GOING TO KILL SOMEBODY.

This, of course, falls into the same category as "wouldn't it be cool if Asuka hums Rammestein to herself absentmindedly at some point&q
